steps.title: Identify the substitution needed
steps.content: We need to find $h(50)$, which means evaluating the function $h(x) = x + 200$ at $x = 50$. To evaluate a function, we substitute the input value into the function definition.

steps.title: Substitute and compute
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 50$ into $h(x) = x + 200$:
$$h(50) = 50 + 200 = 250$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
